description_long: This is a rectangular, three-story apartment building with a flat, weathered roof and a plain, utilitarian facade. The exterior walls are painted white, showing signs of age and some discoloration, especially on the roof. Rows of evenly spaced, rectangular windows with blue frames dominate the longer sides, providing a repetitive and symmetrical appearance. The shorter sides also feature windows, but in fewer numbers, maintaining the building's geometric regularity. There are no visible balconies or decorative elements, and the entrance is not clearly visible from any angle. The overall design is functional, with a focus on maximizing window space and interior light.
description: A plain, three-story rectangular apartment building with a flat, weathered roof and rows of blue-framed windows on white walls.
description_view_0: The long side of the building is visible, showing three floors with rows of blue-framed windows and a plain white facade.
description_view_1: The short end of the building is shown, with three vertical rows of windows and the flat, stained roof more prominent.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible, nearly identical to view 0, with rows of windows and a plain white exterior.
description_view_3: The other short end is shown, similar to view 1, with three vertical rows of windows and the flat roof in view.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in evenly spaced, horizontal rows across each floor, creating a symmetrical and repetitive pattern on both long sides of the building.
